'''Timms UniStar Armaments''' was an arms manufacturer that built the first [[Beam tube/Legends|beam tube]] energy weapons, including the [[Emperor-4 beam tube]]. The company had ceased trading a long time prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="EGWT" /> It shares its name with the latter half of the [[Greff-Timms Industrial/Legends|Greff-Timms Industrial]] corporation's name.
